CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf Equable Ascent Financial, Llc To Respond To Deft'S Form Interrogatories, Req.'S For Admission And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents, Set One And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf'S Counsel Of Record Mark Walsh And Pos
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: appearances:
defendant and moving party jie zhu, appearing in pro per.
no appearance by plaintiff equable ascent financial llc.

PLAINTIFF IS deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

DEFENDANT JIE ZHU'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Equable Ascent Financial, LLC To Respond To Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admission And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff's Counsel Of Record Mark Walsh is off calendar. request for dismissal of entire action was filed may 22, 2012.

judge pro tem arlene barton, not reported.
